title: Lynx Sport Fresh Recharge Shower Gel 500 ml
features: Lynx Sport fresh recharge shower gel hydrates your skin and leaves your body smelling and feeling amazing
Lynx Men's shower gel washes away bacteria and odour leaving your body with an irresistible citrus smell for 12 hours
Lynx Body Wash for men smells amazing thanks to the combination of Arctic Mint, cooling spices and citrus scents
Simply lather up and rinse to enjoy this 3 in 1 body Wash, face Wash and shampoo which is 100% plant-based and with plant-based prebiotics
Lynx Sport shower gel for men contains 92% natural origin ingredients* and gives you everything you need for a great shower in one recyclable bottle
description: Product Description A great day starts with a great Shower and there is no better way to kick-start your day than with Lynx Sport fresh recharge Shower gel. You will be left feeling clean, fresh, and smelling 100% awesome with an energising citrus boost. Wash away bacteria, bust odour, and stay confidently fresh for the whole day. With 12 hours of irresistible smell and freshness, you'll definitely smell and feel ready to conquer anything during your day. Welcome to the future. It smells amazing. All you need for a great Shower - a body wash, A face Wash, and a hair Wash - is waiting for you in one XXL bottle that lasts longer. Just lather up, rinse off, and make the most of your 12 hours of freshness. But the amazing smell is not all that Lynx Sport fresh recharge has to offer. Your skin matters and that is why our body Wash has been dermatologically tested, contains 92% natural origin ingredients*, and is 100% plant-based with plant-based prebiotics. It also contains 5 x more moisturisers** to hydrate your skin every time you take a shower. Remember to recycle the bottle and take care of our planet with Lynx. By 2025 we aim for all of our packaging to be recyclable or to include recycled stuff. *Percentage includes water **vs Lynx +series Shower gel variants. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Glycerin, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Parfum, Sodium Chloride, Sodium Benzoate, Citric Acid, Menthol, Lactic Acid, Disodium EDTA, PPG-6, Saccharide Isomerate, Benzyl Salicylate, Limonene, Linalool, CI 17200, CI 19140 Manufacturer Contact Information Unilever Dept ER, Wirral CH63 3JW UK See more
